description: Ambiguous unit count - EVALS.md A6, GR-4

expected_assertion.reason: PRD §9.2 rule 4 — the number's unit (attendance vs. unique individuals, monthly vs. cumulative) is not clear from the source, so unit_ambiguous must be true; per GR-4 this must route to a unit-ambiguity review card, never a plain confirmation card, and must never be auto-proposed as the students_served value
